name: Asparagus Maltaise
recipeInstructions:
1. Snap off the tough ends of asparagus and discard.
2. Place asparagus in a skillet with 1 inch of water, bring to boil, reduce heat, cover, and simmer until tender (5-8 minutes).
3. In a saucepan or on top of a double boiler, blend egg yolks, lemon juice, and salt.
4. Gradually add butter to the mixture, stirring constantly over low heat or boiling water until melted.
5. Add remaining butter, continuing to stir until melted and the sauce thickens.
6. Stir in orange peel and orange juice.
7. Drain asparagus and serve topped with the sauce.
